Underwater (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,291,078Details
International Box Office $21,886,417
Worldwide Box Office $39,177,495
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,089,563
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,746,919
Total $3,836,482
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A crew of underwater researchers must scramble to safety after an earthquake devastates their subterranean laboratory.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,008,297 (40.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$65,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,791 opening theaters/2,791 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $22,527,378

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 10th, 2020 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: November 29th, 2019 (Wide) (Germany)
January 10th, 2020 (Wide) (France)
January 10th, 2020 (Wide) (Colombia)
January 10th, 2020 (Wide) (Saudi Arabia)
January 10th, 2020 (Wide) (Brazil)
Video Release: April 14th, 2020 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi action and terror, and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2547 (Cert #51126), 10/3/2018)
Running Time: 95 minutes
Plot point: Disaster, Field Scientists, Research Scientist, Underwater
Social setting: Scientific Expedition
Subgenre: Survival Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, Chernin Entertainment, TSG Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
